title: cirsium × foliosum
intro: Cirsium × foliosum, also known as the thistle plumeless sow thistle, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cirsium × foliosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and limitations.
